text:
This variable 
became the SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_1 in 2025 in the source data, when additional submission 
clarification code fields became available (SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_2–SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_5). PDE 
RIF users should use this variable for PDEs with submission dates prior to 1/1/2025, and the new 
SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_1–5 variables for PDEs with submission dates 1/1/2025 and later. 

 ^ Back to TOC ^
